# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Delivery pricing configuration must use one global match mode for all rules (either dimensions+weight or net price), selected before adding rules; rules should ensure full coverage so no product is left without a shipping rate, including requiring 0 PLN starting thresholds in price mode.
- In DeliveryEditor UI, columns should stay compact with no empty gaps when switching between weight-based and price-based mode; in price mode, the name column should appear directly next to visible fields.
